overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark forest trail at night using a flashlight. The path winds through dense vegetation with a large rock formation visible on the right side, creating a tense, atmospheric exploration scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with rock wall on right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest path, sweeping the flashlight across the trail ahead

entered.detail: tall trees forming a dense canopy overhead, blocking the night sky
large textured rock wall running parallel to the path on the right side
narrow winding path covered with fallen leaves and dirt
dense shrubs and low vegetation lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail illuminated only by the character's flashlight. Tall trees form a dense canopy overhead while a prominent rock wall runs along the right side of the path. The character walks steadily forward through the narrow dirt trail, surrounded by dense undergrowth.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest section with close rock wall

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the trail as the rock wall looms closer on the right

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking deeper into the forest along the same narrow trail. The rock formation on the right side grows larger and more prominent as the camera approaches it, filling more of the right side of the frame. The dense vegetation and tree canopy remain consistent as the exploration continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark forest trail that becomes increasingly enclosed by a towering rock formation. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the darkness, illuminating a narrow dirt path flanked by dense undergrowth and a high canopy of trees. As the character walks steadily forward, the surrounding vegetation remains thick while the rock wall on the right begins to loom larger. The scene then shifts as the camera draws closer to the stone face, which expands to fill more of the frame and dominates the right side of the view. Finally, the path narrows further as the character pushes deeper into the oppressive atmosphere of the wooded terrain.
